desc: Rithika, daughter of minister Prathapa Verma, longs for his love despite his resentment. Supported by loyal aide Raju, she faces emotional struggles and unexpected twists in her life.

desc: Separated by birth, Krishna and Gadha are identical twins raised differently. Krishna is forced to marry a man from a cursed family so that her twin can take over once she dies because of the curse.
